titleStmt.title: SII 34.369: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 369. Kunnāṇḍārkōyil, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the second gōpura, left of entrance, in the Parvatagirīśvara temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, Bukkaṇa-uḍaiyar, Nala, Vaigāsi 6 = A.D. 1376, May 1.

Records that a Vikramachōḻa-Muttaraiyaṉ of Kīḻaippuduvayal made an assignment of a fifth of his arasu-sugandaram estate to the temple and stipulated that after his death, in the absence of any male issue, the remaining four-fifths also should go to the temple. He made this gift reciprocating the help rendered by the nāṭṭār of Iraṇḍumalai-nāḍu in restoring his kāṇiyāṭchi and arasu. [There is a fragmentary inscription following this, which seems to be related to No. 368 above].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī pokkaṇa Uṭaiyaṟku naḷa varuṣam
vaykāci mātam 6 nāḷ Uṭaiyār tirukkuṉṟā
kkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku kōṉāṭṭuk kīḻai
pama yalil Araiyarkaḷil Ātaṉa maḻakiyā
rā m cōḻa muttaraiyar nalla peru
māḷāṉa Iraṇṭumalai nāṭṭu vikkiṟama cōḻa mutta
raiyaṉēṉ kallu veṭṭik kuṭutta paricāvatu Eṉ kā
ṇiyāṭciyum Aracum Iraṇṭumalai nāṭṭārum
Iṭṭuttarukaiyil Eṉkāṇi Āṭci Aracu cukantara
m maṟṟum Eṟpeyaṟpaṭṭa Eṉ cukantarattilum nāyaṉā
ṟku nāṉ kuṭutta Añcilē Oṉṟum nāyaṉār Aṉupō
kittukkoḷḷa vārākavum niṉṟa nālu kūṟum Eṉa
kkum piḷḷaikaḷ Iṉakkup piṉpu Inta
Añcu kūṟum cantirātittavarai nāyaṉār Āḷak kaṭavarā
kavum Ippaṭi cammatittu kalluveṭṭikkuṭuttēṉ nāyaṉā
ṟku Iraṇṭu malaiṉāṭṭu vikkiramacōḻa muttaraiyaṉēṉ
This is a fragment of a different inscription which seems to be to No. 368.

svastiśrī paṇa Uṭaiyarukku cellā
ñkkulai ra nāṭṭu vaṭapaṉaiyūr nāṭṭu nā
ṭaṉ kūṭṭamu ruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati ḷ Uṭa
ṉ Araiyirā
Digital edition of SII 34.369 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
